林木遭人算计，
与忠仆老墨一同惨死于荒野。
意外获得长生系统。
……
既然善道难行，从今往后我林木便要做那反派！
拍卖会上竞价失利？无妨，事后抢夺即可！
名门正派，若看着不顺眼，直接打上门去！
大帝、圣女，挥手间便可拍飞！
……
当林木感觉无敌真寂寞之时！
却发现了一个惊天阴谋……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o174785e278346616471bf5cefc29286f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"宅家吃黄瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7368026564690185278","book_name":"反派不嚣张跋扈，那不是白无敌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":513,"name":"高武世界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=513&name=高武世界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7368026887475429950","read_count":"304","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"422492"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"196","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,反派,无敌,无女主,架空,高武世界,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b1ebd884a2c86520574475d3bfbd6994~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318600&x-signature=YzbXjvAQaRN48Njmgz9Ywuoy5WI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4117039379914024","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read
